Information about Enrollment Assistance.description: Help and guidance available to assist members with enrolling in a health plan.
examples: Can someone help me understand how to enroll in a Medicare plan?
Is there assistance available to help me enroll in United Healthcare?

enrollment application process.description: Steps, forms, and methods used to apply for a health insurance plan.
examples: How do I complete the enrollment application?
What is the process for applying for a Medicare Advantage plan?

enrollment deadline.description: Important dates by which enrollment must be completed.
examples: When is the deadline to enroll in this plan?
Do I need to enroll before a certain date to avoid issues?

late enrollment.description: Questions about enrolling after the standard enrollment period and possible penalties.
examples: What happens if I enroll late?
Is there a penalty for late enrollment in Medicare?

plan coverage scope.description: What services and benefits are included or excluded in the plan.
examples: What does this plan cover?
What services are included in my current plan?

current plan inquiry.description: Identifying the member’s currently active plan and benefits.
examples: What plan am I currently on?
Can you tell me what coverage I have right now?

specific plan inquiry (already covered i.description: Questions about a specific named plan.
examples: What is included in the Dual Complete plan?
Can you explain the Essentials plan benefits?
How much does this plan cost per month?
What are the costs associated with this plan?

general eligibility.description: Basic eligibility requirements for Medicare or plan enrollment.
examples: Am I eligible for this plan?
Do I qualify for Medicare coverage?

low income subsidy eligibility.description: Eligibility for Extra Help or low-income subsidies.
examples: Do I qualify for Extra Help?
How does low income affect my eligibility?

medical condition based eligibility.description: Eligibility based on specific medical or chronic conditions.
examples: Do my chronic conditions qualify me for a special needs plan?
Does diabetes make me eligible for additional benefits?

eligibility for extra benefits.description: Eligibility for non-medical benefits such as food or transportation.
examples: Do I qualify for grocery or food benefits?
What conditions qualify me for extra benefits?

location based eligibility.description: Eligibility based on state, county, or service area.
examples: Is this plan available where I live?
Does my zip code affect my eligibility?

dual plan eligibility.description: Eligibility for plans requiring both Medicare and Medicaid.
examples: Do I qualify for a dual complete plan?
Do I need both Medicare and Medicaid to enroll?

provider network status.description: Whether a provider is in-network or out-of-network.
examples: Is my doctor in-network?
Does this hospital accept my plan?

finding providers.description: Help locating doctors, hospitals, or specialists.
examples: Can you help me find a doctor near me?
How do I find an in-network specialist?

primary care physician related queries.description: Questions about PCP assignment or changes.
examples: Who is my primary care doctor?
Can I change my primary care physician?
Do I need a referral to see a specialist?
How do I get a referral from my PCP?

out of network provider.description: Coverage rules for providers outside the network.
examples: Can I see an out-of-network doctor?
Will my plan cover out-of-network services?

related to provider changes.description: Providers leaving or joining the network.
examples: Why is my doctor no longer accepting my plan?
What happens if my provider leaves the network?

premiums (monthly) for plans.description: Monthly payment required to keep the plan active.
examples: What is my monthly premium?
Does this plan have a $0 premium?
Do I have a deductible?
How much is my deductible?

copays (fixed visit costs).description: Flat fees paid for services like doctor visits.
examples: What is my copay for seeing a specialist?
Do I have a copay for doctor visits?
What does 20% coinsurance mean?
How much coinsurance do I pay for hospital stays?
How much will my medications cost?
Do I have copays for prescriptions?
Is Ozempic covered under my plan?
Does the plan cover Eliquis?

drug costs.description: Copays, coinsurance, or pricing for medications.
examples: Why did my medication cost increase?
What is the copay for this drug?

doctor approval/verification.description: Prior authorization or doctor verification requirements.
examples: Do I need prior authorization for this medication?
Why does my doctor need to verify my prescription?

over the counter drugs.description: Coverage for OTC items and allowances.
examples: Do I have an OTC benefit?
What can I buy with my OTC card?

upgrading.description: Switching plans to get better or additional benefits.
examples: Can I upgrade my plan for better dental coverage?
Is there a plan with more benefits than my current one?

switching plan types.description: Changing between HMO, PPO, or Supplement plans.
examples: Can I switch from an HMO to a PPO?
Is it possible to move from Medicare Advantage to a supplement?

address / move‑related changes.description: Plan changes required due to relocation.
examples: Do I need to change my plan if I move?
What happens to my coverage if I move to another state?

going back to previous plan.description: Reinstating or returning to a former plan.
examples: Can I go back to my old plan?
Is it possible to reinstate my previous coverage?

cancellation of plan.description: Ending or disenrolling from a plan.
examples: How do I cancel my plan?
What happens if I disenroll?

unwanted plan changes.description: Plans changed without the member’s consent.
examples: Why was my plan changed without my permission?
I didn’t authorize this plan change—what happened?
Does my plan include transportation?
Can I get a ride to my doctor appointment?

transportation trips limit.description: Limits on number of covered rides.
examples: How many transportation trips do I get?
Is there a limit on rides per year?

booking, ride issues, and assistance.description: Scheduling rides and resolving ride issues.
examples: How do I book a ride?
Why was my ride cancelled?

food benefits coverage.description: Eligibility for grocery or food benefits.
examples: Do I qualify for food benefits?
Is a food card included with my plan?

food benefits amount and charges.description: Amounts and deductions related to food benefits.
examples: How much money do I get on my food card?
Why did my food benefit amount change?

food card issues.description: Problems using or activating food cards.
examples: Why is my food card not working?
How do I activate my food card?
Does my plan include a gym membership?
Do I qualify for SilverSneakers?

gym activation and code.description: How to activate gym benefits and get codes.
examples: How do I get my gym access code?
How do I activate my gym membership?
Why can’t the gym find my membership?
Why did my gym benefit stop working?
I can’t log into my account.
Why does it say my account is locked?
Why can’t I register my account?
It says user not found when I try to register.
The app keeps logging me out.
Why doesn’t the app show my benefits?
Is the website down?
Why can’t I find my plan information online?
Why does my plan not show online?
Why does it say my coverage is inactive?

communication & notification problems.description: Issues with emails, letters, or texts.
examples: Why didn’t I get notified about this change?
I’m getting confusing messages about my plan.
What is the difference between HMO and PPO?
Should I choose a supplement or Advantage plan?

medicare advantage vs medicare supplemen.description: Comparing Advantage plans to Medigap plans.
examples: How is Medicare Advantage different from Medigap?
Which option is better for me?
What is the difference between Plan G and Plan N?
Is Plan F better than Plan G?
How does the Dual Complete plan compare to others?
Is a dual plan better for me?
What benefits does the chronic special needs plan offer?
How is it different from a regular plan?
Which plan has better dental or OTC benefits?
Do grocery benefits differ by plan?
Which plan costs less overall?
How do copays compare between plans?
Which prescription plan is better for my medications?
What is the difference between Saver and Preferred?
Where can I find my Medicare number?
What if I don’t have my Medicare card?
What is my member ID number?
How do I get my member ID?
Is my Medicare number the same as my member ID?
Which number do I give to the pharmacy?
Do I have dental coverage?
Is dental included in my plan?
What is my dental coverage limit?
How much dental coverage do I have left?
How much will I pay for a crown?
Why was I charged for a cleaning?

dental code related coverage.description: Coverage rules based on procedure codes.
examples: Is code D7140 covered?
How often is deep cleaning allowed?
Can I use my dentist?
Is my dentist in-network?
Why was my dental claim denied?
How do I appeal a dental bill?
What happens if I move to another state?
Do I need a new plan after moving?

plan discontinued.description: Plans no longer offered in an area.
examples: Is my plan discontinued?
Does this plan still exist?
Why was my plan terminated?
Why did my coverage suddenly end?
When did my plan end?
What coverage do I have now?
Do I need to renew my plan?
Am I eligible to renew my coverage?
Why did my plan expire?
When does my coverage end?
How do I renew my plan?
Can I renew online?
Do I have vision coverage?
What vision benefits are included?

vision providers & network.description: Finding eye doctors and network rules.
examples: Is my eye doctor in-network?
How do I find a vision provider?
Do I get coverage for glasses?
What is my eyeglass allowance?

general inquiry about drug termination.description: Loss or termination of drug coverage.
examples: Why was my prescription coverage terminated?
Why does the pharmacy say I’m not covered?
Why wasn’t I notified about my drug coverage ending?
I never got a letter—why was my plan stopped?

other.description: Questions that do not fit into the above categories.
examples: I have a question about my plan that I can’t categorize.
This issue doesn’t seem to fit into any of the other topics.
